recommendations.title: Robot Chicken: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, Action, TV Movie, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A series of 30 sketches, following the hilarious antics of various characters from a galaxy, far, far away.

recommendations.title: The Time Machine
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Romance
recommendations.overview: A Victorian Englishman travels to the far future and finds that humanity has divided into two hostile species.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Infinite Two Minutes
recommendations.overview: A cafe owner discovers that the TV in his cafe suddenly shows images from the future, but only two minutes into the future.

recommendations.title: Kaili Blues
recommendations.overview: Chen Sheng goes off in search of his nephew who has been abandoned by his father. Along the way, he encounters numerous people from his past and also those from his future.

recommendations.title: Star Trek: Section 31
recommendations.overview: Emperor Philippa Georgiou joins a secret division of Starfleet tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets and faces the sins of her past.

recommendations.title: Hotel Gagarin
recommendations.overview: An highly heterogeneous group of people go to Armenia to make a movie, all ignoring what will happen to each of them.

recommendations.title: The Great Buddha+

recommendations.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
recommendations.overview: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails reunite against a powerful new adversary, Shadow, a mysterious villain with powers unlike anything they have faced before. With their abilities outmatched in every way, Team Sonic must seek out an unlikely alliance in hopes

recommendations.title: Arco
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: 10-year-old Arco lives in a far future. During his first flight in his rainbow suit, he loses control and falls into the past. Iris, a girl his age from 2075, comes to his rescue and tries by all means to help send him back to his era.

recommendations.title: Ghost in the Shell
recommendations.overview: In the near future, Major is the first of her kind: a human saved from a terrible crash, then cyber-enhanced to be a perfect soldier devoted to stopping the world's most dangerous criminals.
